subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at Dyer home in Washington, 1912-04-24
subcodes.first_line: A meeting such as this seems like a beautiful cluster of precious jewels -- pearls, rubies, diamonds, sapphires
subcodes.subjects: @composition and decomposition, @competition vs. cooperation; the struggle for existence, @unity in diversity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @race unity; racial issues
